question_pt: Quantas internacoes existem por descricao de complexidade?
sql: SELECT c.DESCRICAO AS complexidade, COUNT(*) AS internacoes, ROUND(SUM(CAST(i.VAL_TOT AS DECIMAL(20,2))), 2) AS valor_total FROM internacoes i JOIN complexidade c ON i.COMPLEX = c.COMPLEX GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY internacoes DESC
